item.title: OECD sees Iran war moderating global growth, fanning inflation
item.description: Global GDP growth projected to ease from 3.3% last year to 2.9% in 2026 amid high energy prices

item.description: Democratic officials are reassessing targets as concerns grow over energy affordability

item.description: We asked the portfolio manager at Purpose Investments’ if a new commodity bull market is under way

item.title: Air Canada CEO addresses language controversy following English-only condolence video
item.description: Michael Rousseau says he’s ‘deeply saddened’ his inability to speak French has taken attention away from those affected by Sunday’s plane crash

item.title: Private credit rating agency hits back at ‘incendiary allegation’ by SEC
item.description: Egan-Jones claims US regulator harmed its business with publication of order this week

item.description: Company will pay into a public safety escrow fund with no time limit or cap in anticipation of protests at the site
